title: Oeosporangium tinaei
taxonomy: Oeosporangium tinaei is a species of lichenized fern in the family Plagiogyriaceae. It belongs to the genus Oeosporangium and is classified under the division Pteridophyta, kingdom Plantae. Oeosporangium tinaei is also categorized under the phylum Lycopodiophyta and the class Polypodiopsida. This classification reflects its unique characteristics as a lichenized fern. The classification of Oeosporangium tinaei helps in understanding its evolutionary relationships and ecological significance.
